title: Kifuda
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] up to [blue]3[/blue] cards with [purple]Adroit[/purple].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Upon pickup, triggers a card selection prompt allowing you to enchant up to 3 cards with Adroit (Strength level 3).
